title: LPC — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Landmarks Preservation Commission (LPC) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the LPC Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/lpc, the Discover NYC Landmarks map (Esri ArcGIS Online), and the Portico permit portal (Salesforce Experience Cloud). Includes the NYC geography spine and LPC's own designation key (LP number / LP_NUMBER).

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

TaxLot.description: NYC Borough-Block-Lot identity carried by nearly every LPC dataset — the join key back to PLUTO and the rest of city government.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

LandmarkReference.description: A reference to an LPC designation by its LP number — the Commission's primary designation key.

lpNumber.description: LPC designation number ('LP_NUMBER' / 'LPC#' / 'docket') — LPC's primary designation key.

historicDistrict.description: Historic district this record sits within ('HIST_DISTRICT'), if any.
